title: survey.toml
description: Parameter survey definition for simctl (Cartesian product expansion)

case.description: Path to the case.toml to use as template

params.description: Parameter axes for Cartesian product. Each key is a dot-notation parameter, value is an array of values.

additionalProperties.description: Array of values for this parameter axis

slurm.description: Slurm job parameters (shared across all runs)
